items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Colombian Foreign Minister Luis Gilberto Murillo said his country would receive returning Colombian nationals who were deported from the United States following a showdown with Washington over accepting the flights. The announcement came hours after President Donald Trump threatened steep tariffs on imports and other sanctions on the longtime U.S. partner. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4haXm63

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:

A driver is in custody and the collision did not immediately appear to be intentional, the Philadelphia Police Department said in a social media post. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hxjkjq

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:

items.title: LIVE: Palestinians set to cross into northern Gaza in vehicles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Salah al-Din Street, the main north-south road running the length of Gaza, as Palestinians wait to return to their homes in the northern half of the coastal enclave by cars. Israel allowed Palestinians to return on foot from Wadi Gaza earlier today. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hdWJZw

#gaza #palestinian #live #news</article>

items.title: LIVE: Thousands of Palestinians return to northern Gaza
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Wadi Gaza as Israel allows Palestinians to return to heavily destroyed northern Gaza for the first time since the early weeks of the 15-month war with Hamas, in accordance with a fragile ceasefire. Tens of thousands of Palestinians are headed north after waiting for days to cross. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4gdwXmK

#gaza #palestinian #israel #live</article>

items.content:

items.content:

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The proximity to the Lebanese border made Manara so vulnerable in the war between Israel and Hezbollah that it became a symbol of the heavy price of fighting, with rockets and explosive drones damaging the majority of homes. The kibbutz was evacuated along with some 60,000 people, who the Israeli government told to leave dozens of towns and villages along the border. (AP video shot by Ami Ben Tov) Read more here: https://bit.ly/42rxgHd

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live telescope views of six planets gracing the sky in what’s known as a planetary parade. Venus, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn are visible to the naked eye this month and for part of February. Uranus and Neptune can be spotted with binoculars and telescopes. Read more here: https://bit.ly/40zxXvP
Credit: Gianluca Masi-Virtual Telescope Project

#space #planet #live</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>India celebrates Republic Day with a parade in New Delhi showcasing the country’s defense capability and cultural diversity. The event marks the anniversary of the adoption of the country’s Constitution on Jan. 26, 1950, nearly three years after it won independence from British colonial rule. Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto will be the chief guest at the parade.

#india #republicday #live</article>

items.title: Trump leans into his pledge to eliminate taxes on tips at a Las Vegas rally
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:

items.title: The destroyed hospitals in the Gaza Strip
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Palestinians in Gaza are confronting an apocalyptic landscape of devastation after more than 15 months of fighting between Israel and Hamas. Mounds of rubble stretch as far as the eye can see in the tiny coastal enclave where built-up refugee camps are interspersed between cities. Gaza's hospitals lie in ruins, leaving northern Gaza with almost no functional health services.

#gaza #palestinian #news

Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.content:

<article>In return for the four soldiers, Israel should free 200 Palestinian prisoners or detainees, including 120 militants serving life sentences after being convicted of deadly attacks.

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:

items.title: Congo man inspires new generation after being killed fighting corruption
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In the capital of eastern Congo’s conflict-ridden North Kivu province, the Floribert Bwana Chui School of Peace takes in street children and those displaced by war. It's named after a murdered Congolese customs officer who fought corruption, his beatification approved by Pope Francis, comes 17 years after his assassination. Read more: https://bit.ly/42qF7ow

items.title: A$AP Rocky pushes past photographers to enter court
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Rapper A$AP Rocky pushed past several photographers on Friday as he entered a Los Angeles court for opening statements in his assault trial.

Rocky, whose legal name is Rakim Mayers, is accused of shooting a former friend near a Hollywood hotel in 2021.

#shorts #asaprocky #trial #losangeles</article>

items.content:

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live from Asheville as President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump travel to western North Carolina to meet families affected by Hurricane Helene.

Trump is using the first trip of his second administration to visit areas where politics has complicated the response to deadly disasters. Follow live updates here: https://bit.ly/3Ck642E

#trump #news #live #donaldtrump</article>

items.content:

items.title: Indonesia and France sign deal to send home ailing French national on death row for drug offenses
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Serge Atlaoui will be repatriated to France after being on death row since 2007 for alleged drug offenses. The 61-year-old won a last-minute reprieve from being executed by a 13-member firing squad In 2015.
(AP Video by Fadlan Syam)

#indonesia #france #news

items.title: Trump orders release of JFK, RFK and MLK assassination records
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The executive order Trump signed Thursday also aims to declassify the remaining federal records relating to the assassinations of President John F. Kennedy, Sen. Robert F. Kennedy and Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. The order is among a flurry of executive actions Trump has quickly taken the first week of his second term. (Produced by Luke Garratt). Read more: https://bit.ly/40Nj0Hu

#trump #news #jfk #mlk

Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Belarus election is poised to extend the 30-year rule of 'Europe's last dictator'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>With many of his political opponents either jailed or exiled abroad, 70-year-old Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko is back on the ballot. When the election concludes on Sunday, he's all but certain to add a seventh term as the only leader most people in post-Soviet Belarus have ever known. Read more: https://bit.ly/4jxrudd 

#belarus #news 
Photo credit: Belarus' Presidential Press Service

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: Giant Pandas Bao Li and Qing Bao make public debut at Smithsonian National Zoo
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the Smithsonian National Zoo: a panda ceremony with zoo staff leaders, as giant pandas Bao Li and Qing Bao make their public debut. The furry black-and-white icons are on a 10-year loan from China, which owns all the pandas in the world.

#panda #giantpanda #smithsonian #usa #news #live</article>

items.title: A$AP Rocky trial LIVE: Opening statements begin
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as opening statements begin in A$AP Rocky’s assault trial. He is accused of two felony counts of assault with a semiautomatic firearm for allegedly firing a gun at a former friend in Hollywood in 2021. Read more: https://bit.ly/40ncohO 

#asaprocky #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Senate votes on Pete Hegseth as defense secretary
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as the Senate is muscling Pete Hegseth’s nomination as defense secretary toward confirmation Friday.

With votes expected late in the evening, the Republican-led Senate is determined to install Hegseth, a former Fox News host and combat veteran, and round out President Donald Trump’s top national security Cabinet officials. Read more: https://bit.ly/3C9Rqeo

#petehegseth #news #live #trump</article>

items.title: Palestinians hoping to return to homes in Gaza face agonizing wait
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>For the first time since Israel invaded Gaza 15 months ago, Palestinians will enjoy more freedom of movement from the north to the south of the enclave. Many are hopeful, but carry worries about what they might find on their return. (AP video shot by Abdel Kareem Hana; Production by Wafaa Shurafa). 

#israel #gaza #news

items.title: Israeli families call on US President Trump to ensure all hostages held in Gaza released
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Families of Israeli hostages have called on US President Donald Trump to ensure all hostages held in Gaza are released. Among those appealing to Trump was Simcha Goldin, the father of Hadar Goldin, an Israeli soldier whose body has been held by militants in Gaza since 2014 despite a public campaign by the family to return his remains. (AP video shot by Shlomo Mor)

#israelhamaswar #trump #gaza #news
